# programs.irssi

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.irssi`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.irssi.aliases` | `attribute set of string` | An attribute set that maps aliases to commands. |
| `programs.irssi.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the Irssi chat client. |
| `programs.irssi.extraConfig` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | These lines are appended to the Irssi configuration. |
| `programs.irssi.networks` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | An attribute set of chat networks. |
| `programs.irssi.networks.<name>.autoCommands` | `list of string` | List of commands to execute on connect. |
| `programs.irssi.networks.<name>.channels` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | Channels for the given network. |
| `programs.irssi.networks.<name>.channels.<name>.autoJoin` | `boolean` | Whether to join this channel on connect. |
| `programs.irssi.networks.<name>.nick` | `string` | Nickname in that network. |
| `programs.irssi.networks.<name>.saslExternal` | `boolean` | Enable SASL external authentication. This requires setting a path in [](#opt-programs.irssi.networks._name_.server.ssl.certificateFile). |
| `programs.irssi.networks.<name>.server.address` | `string` | Address of the chat server. |
| `programs.irssi.networks.<name>.server.autoConnect` | `boolean` | Whether Irssi connects to the server on launch. |
| `programs.irssi.networks.<name>.server.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port of the chat server. |
| `programs.irssi.networks.<name>.server.ssl.certificateFile` | `null or absolute path` | Path to a file containing the certificate used for client authentication to the server. |
| `programs.irssi.networks.<name>.server.ssl.enable` | `boolean` | Whether SSL should be used. |
| `programs.irssi.networks.<name>.server.ssl.verify` | `boolean` | Whether the SSL certificate should be verified. |
| `programs.irssi.networks.<name>.type` | `string` | Type of the network. |
| `programs.irssi.package` | `null or package` | The irssi package to use. |
